summary: W1573 exposes W1506 strict-preimage-map-fields comparison evidence on the final OriginalFourTaskContractCompletion surface: the W1506 74-input count, preservation of the W1505 74-input ledger, W719 normalized fixed-target data, W892 explicit strict-preimage-map field leaves, the strict-representative map-data family rebuilt through W892, W891 strict-preimage-object leaves, W733 concrete leaves, W732 route data, direct bounded-left calculus, the bounded derived infinity-category package, strict-representative map-data equality with W1498, W891 object-leaves equality with W1505, concrete-leaves equality with W1505, and the nonterminal productSuccessClaimed=false witness.
